task: Show me the options for a roundtrip leaving from Las Vegas on flexible dates on the interactive map on united.
final_result_response:
Now I have a complete picture. I've successfully navigated to United's interactive "Explore destinations" map showing roundtrip options from Las Vegas with flexible dates. The page is fully loaded and displaying all available destinations with prices on the interactive map.

Here's the complete summary of what's displayed:

The **Explore destinations** interactive map on United.com is now showing **roundtrip flights from Las Vegas (LAS)** with **flexible dates** and a max price of **$2,000**. Here are all the destinations listed with their best available roundtrip fares:

| # | Destination | Dates | Price |
|---|-------------|-------|-------|
| 1 | **Bozeman, MT (BZN)** | Mar 17 – Mar 21 | **$189** |
| 2 | **Denver, CO (DEN)** | Mar 28 – Apr 1 | **$189** |
| 3 | **Boston, MA (BOS)** | Mar 25 – Mar 31 | **$232** |
| 4 | **Albuquerque, NM (ABQ)** | Mar 24 – Mar 31 | **$251** |
| 5 | **Colorado Springs, CO (COS)** | *(partially visible)* | ~$265 |
| 6 | **Nashville, TN (BNA)** | Mar 25 – Mar 27 | **$322** |
| 7 | **Columbus, OH (CMH)** | Mar 30 – Apr 6 | **$327** |
| 8 | **Charleston, SC (CHS)** | Mar 25 – Apr 1 | **$331** |
| 9 | **Atlanta, GA (ATL)** | Mar 23 – Mar 25 | **$348** |
| 10 | **Dallas, TX (DFW)** | Mar 25 – Apr 1 | **$351** |
| 11 | **Detroit, MI (DTW)** | Mar 30 – Apr 6 | **$353** |
| 12 | **Hartford, CT (BDL)** | Mar 25 – Apr 1 | **$357** |
| 13 | **Cleveland, OH (CLE)** | Mar 30 – Apr 6 | **$374** |
| 14 | **Charlotte, NC (CLT)** | Mar 28 – Apr 4 | **$378** |
| 15 | **Cincinnati, OH (CVG)** | Mar 27 – Mar 31 | **$389** |
| 16 | **Cancún, MX (CUN)** | Mar 30 – Apr 1 | **$408** |
| 17 | **Baltimore, MD (BWI)** | Mar 30 – Apr 6 | **$409** |
| 18 | **Washington, DC (DCA)** | Mar 23 – Mar 25 | **$414** |
| 19 | **Buffalo, NY (BUF)** | Mar 24 – Mar 31 | **$440** |

The map also shows additional price pins for destinations like **New York ($414–$487)**, **San Francisco ($251)**, and others across the US and into Mexico/Caribbean. You can click any destination on the map or in the list to explore specific flight details. You can also refine your search using the **"Refine search"** option, adjust the **max price**, or change the **flexible dates** settings.
thoughts: I'll help you find roundtrip options from Las Vegas with flexible dates on United's interactive map. Let me navigate to the United Airlines website first.

I can see the United Airlines homepage with the booking form. I need to:
1. First close the sign-in popup
2. Set the departure city to Las Vegas
3. Check the "Flexible dates" checkbox
4. Make sure Roundtrip is selected

Let me close the sign-in popup first, then update the "From" field to Las Vegas.
Good, the sign-in popup is closed. I can see a cookie banner at the bottom. Let me accept cookies first, then update the departure city to Las Vegas.
The cookie banner is still there. Let me click the "Accept cookies" button more precisely.
Let me try clicking the close button on the cookie banner instead, and also proceed with changing the From field. Let me click the X button to dismiss the cookie banner.
Let me proceed with the main task. I'll click on the "From" field to change it to Las Vegas.
The "From" field is now cleared and shows "Origin" as placeholder text. Now let me type "Las Vegas" in this field.
I can see the autocomplete suggestion showing "Las Vegas, NV, US (LAS)". Let me click on that suggestion.

"Las Vegas LAS" is now set as the departure city. The form shows:
- From: Las Vegas LAS
- Roundtrip is selected
- Now I need to check the "Flexible dates" checkbox

Let me click on the "Flexible dates" checkbox.

The "Flexible dates" checkbox is now checked. The form has updated to show flexible date options (Feb, 6 days). The setup is:
- **From**: Las Vegas LAS
- **Roundtrip** selected
- **Flexible dates** checked

Now I need to click "Find flights" to search and see the interactive map. Since no destination is specified, this should show the explore/map view.
The interactive map has fully loaded. Let me close the sign-in popup to get a better view, and then also check the "List of search results" to see all destination options.
Now I have a clear view of the interactive map. Let me expand the "List of search results" to see all the destination options with prices.

Excellent! The list of search results is now expanded showing roundtrip destinations from Las Vegas with flexible dates. I can see:

1. **Bozeman, MT, US (BZN)** - Tue, Mar 17 - Sat, Mar 21 from $189
2. **Denver, CO, US (DEN)** - Sat, Mar 28 - Wed, Apr 1 from $189
3. **Boston, MA, US (BOS)** - Wed, Mar 25 - Tue, Mar 31 from $232
4. **Albuquerque, NM, US (ABQ)** - Tue, Mar 24 - Tue, Mar 31 from $251

Let me scroll down to see more results.
I can see more results now. Let me continue scrolling through the list to see all available destinations.
I can see more results. Let me continue scrolling to see all destinations.
More destinations are appearing. Let me continue scrolling to see the rest.

I can now see the complete list of destinations. I also notice the map has scrolled down to show Mexico and the Caribbean area, with a $408 price tag visible (Cancún). The bottom of the list shows:

- Cincinnati, OH (CVG) - from $389
- Cancún, MX (CUN) - from $408
- Baltimore, MD (BWI) - from $409
- Washington, DC (DCA) - from $414
- Buffalo, NY (BUF) - from $440

And at the bottom there's a note: "*The prices shown are roundtrip fares and have been available within the last 48 hours. Additional baggage fees may apply. Fare prices in miles will include additional taxes and fees."

I also need to scroll back up to capture the one destination I may have missed between Atlanta and Dallas. Let me scroll back up slightly to check.
